message:
feat: add PLAS benchmark, burn-in gate, and lockstep modules with suite runner scripts

Introduce three new Platform Lifecycle Assurance System (PLAS) modules and their
corresponding test suite runner scripts:

- plas_benchmark_bundle: performance benchmarking infrastructure for measuring
  and tracking engine operation throughput and latency baselines
- plas_burn_in_gate: staged promotion gate requiring sustained operation under
  load before allowing extension advancement through trust tiers
- plas_lockstep: synchronized execution verification ensuring deterministic
  replay consistency across engine instances

Each module includes a dedicated runner script (scripts/run_plas_*_suite.sh) with
structured logging, timeout handling, and artifact capture. Also updates lib.rs
module declarations and enhances the shadow evaluation gate suite script with
per-step timestamped logging, structured manifest schema, and artifact recovery
logic for stalled remote command execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,196 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_capability_escrow_${timestamp}}"
+artifact_root="${CAPABILITY_ESCROW_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/capability_escrow_suite}"
+run_dir="$artifact_root/$timestamp"
+manifest_path="$run_dir/run_manifest.json"
+events_path="$run_dir/capability_escrow_events.jsonl"
+logs_dir="$run_dir/logs"
+rch_timeout_seconds="${RCH_EXEC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-900}"
+bead_id="${CAPABILITY_ESCROW_BEAD_ID:-bd-2vnj}"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir" "$logs_dir"
+
+run_rch() {
+  timeout "${rch_timeout_seconds}" rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=$toolchain" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$target_dir" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+declare -a command_logs=()
+failed_command=""
+failed_log_path=""
+manifest_written=false
+mode_completed=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  local step_index="${#commands_run[@]}"
+  local log_path="${logs_dir}/step_$(printf '%02d' "$step_index").log"
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  command_logs+=("$log_path")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if run_rch "$@" > >(tee "$log_path") 2>&1; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  if rg -q "Remote command finished: exit=0" "$log_path"; then
+    echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out or stalled" \
+      | tee -a "$log_path"
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  failed_command="$command_text"
+  failed_log_path="$log_path"
+  return 1
+}
+
+json_or_null() {
+  local value="$1"
+  if [[ -n "$value" ]]; then
+    printf '"%s"' "$value"
+  else
+    printf 'null'
+  fi
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants -- -D warnings
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants -- -D warnings
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-extension-host --test capability_escrow_adversarial -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+  mode_completed=true
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local git_commit dirty_worktree outcome idx comma error_code_json failed_log_json
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 && "$mode_completed" == true ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+    error_code_json='null'
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-ESCROW-0010"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"$run_dir/commands.txt"
+  failed_log_json="$(json_or_null "$failed_log_path")"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.capability-escrow-suite.run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "component": "capability_escrow_suite",'
+    echo "  \"bead_id\": \"${bead_id}\","
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\"," 
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${timestamp}\"," 
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\"," 
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\"," 
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\"," 
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\"," 
+    echo "  \"mode_completed\": ${mode_completed},"
+    echo "  \"commands_executed\": ${#commands_run[@]},"
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\"," 
+    fi
+    echo "  \"failed_log\": ${failed_log_json},"
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "command_logs": ['
+    for idx in "${!command_logs[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#command_logs[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${command_logs[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${run_dir}/commands.txt\"," 
+    echo "    \"logs_dir\": \"${logs_dir}\"," 
+    echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\"," 
+    echo '    "source_module": "crates/franken-extension-host/src/lib.rs",'
+    echo '    "integration_test": "crates/franken-extension-host/tests/capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants.rs"'
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/commands.txt\"," 
+    echo "    \"find ${logs_dir} -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort\"," 
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"$manifest_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"trace_id\":\"trace-capability-escrow-${timestamp}\",\"decision_id\":\"decision-capability-escrow-${timestamp}\",\"policy_id\":\"policy-capability-escrow-v1\",\"component\":\"capability_escrow_suite\",\"event\":\"suite_completed\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  echo "capability escrow run manifest: $manifest_path"
+  echo "capability escrow events: $events_path"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode

+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_benchmark_bundle -- -D warnings" \

+      ;;

+
+  mode_completed=true
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local git_commit dirty_worktree outcome idx comma error_code_json failed_log_json
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 && "$mode_completed" == true ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+    error_code_json='null'
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-PLAS-BENCH-2004"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false

+  fi

+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\","

+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\"," 
+    echo "  \"mode_completed\": ${mode_completed},"
+    echo "  \"commands_executed\": ${#commands_run[@]},"
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\"," 
+    fi
+    echo "  \"failed_log\": ${failed_log_json},"

+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "command_logs": ['
+    for idx in "${!command_logs[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#command_logs[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${command_logs[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${run_dir}/commands.txt\"," 
+    echo "    \"logs_dir\": \"${logs_dir}\"," 
+    echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\"," 
+    echo '    "source_module": "crates/franken-engine/src/plas_benchmark_bundle.rs",'
+    echo '    "integration_test": "crates/franken-engine/tests/plas_benchmark_bundle.rs"'
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/commands.txt\"," 
+    echo "    \"find ${logs_dir} -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort\"," 
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"$manifest_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"trace_id\":\"trace-plas-benchmark-bundle-${timestamp}\",\"decision_id\":\"decision-plas-benchmark-bundle-${timestamp}\",\"policy_id\":\"policy-plas-benchmark-bundle-v1\",\"component\":\"plas_benchmark_bundle_suite\",\"event\":\"suite_completed\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  echo "PLAS benchmark bundle manifest: $manifest_path"
+  echo "PLAS benchmark bundle events: $events_path"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_plas_burn_in_gate_${timestamp}}"
+artifact_root="${PLAS_BURN_IN_GATE_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/plas_burn_in_gate}"
+run_dir="$artifact_root/$timestamp"
+manifest_path="$run_dir/run_manifest.json"
+events_path="$run_dir/plas_burn_in_gate_events.jsonl"
+logs_dir="$run_dir/logs"
+rch_timeout_seconds="${RCH_EXEC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-900}"
+bead_id="${PLAS_BURN_IN_GATE_BEAD_ID:-bd-24ie}"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir" "$logs_dir"
+
+run_rch() {
+  timeout "${rch_timeout_seconds}" rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=$toolchain" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$target_dir" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+declare -a command_logs=()
+failed_command=""
+failed_log_path=""
+manifest_written=false
+mode_completed=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  local step_index="${#commands_run[@]}"
+  local log_path="${logs_dir}/step_$(printf '%02d' "$step_index").log"
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  command_logs+=("$log_path")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if run_rch "$@" > >(tee "$log_path") 2>&1; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  if rg -q "Remote command finished: exit=0" "$log_path"; then
+    echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out or stalled" \
+      | tee -a "$log_path"
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  failed_command="$command_text"
+  failed_log_path="$log_path"
+  return 1
+}
+
+json_or_null() {
+  local value="$1"
+  if [[ -n "$value" ]]; then
+    printf '"%s"' "$value"
+  else
+    printf 'null'
+  fi
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_burn_in_gate_integration -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+  mode_completed=true
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local git_commit dirty_worktree outcome idx comma error_code_json failed_log_json
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 && "$mode_completed" == true ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+    error_code_json='null'
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-PLAS-BURN-IN-0010"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"$run_dir/commands.txt"
+  failed_log_json="$(json_or_null "$failed_log_path")"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.plas-burn-in-gate-suite.run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "component": "plas_burn_in_gate_suite",'
+    echo "  \"bead_id\": \"${bead_id}\","
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${timestamp}\","
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\","
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\","
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\","
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\","
+    echo "  \"mode_completed\": ${mode_completed},"
+    echo "  \"commands_executed\": ${#commands_run[@]},"
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\","
+    fi
+    echo "  \"failed_log\": ${failed_log_json},"
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "command_logs": ['
+    for idx in "${!command_logs[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#command_logs[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${command_logs[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${run_dir}/commands.txt\","
+    echo "    \"logs_dir\": \"${logs_dir}\","
+    echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\","
+    echo '    "source_module": "crates/franken-engine/src/plas_burn_in_gate.rs",'
+    echo '    "integration_test": "crates/franken-engine/tests/plas_burn_in_gate_integration.rs"'
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/commands.txt\","
+    echo "    \"find ${logs_dir} -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort\","
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"$manifest_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"trace_id\":\"trace-plas-burn-in-${timestamp}\",\"decision_id\":\"decision-plas-burn-in-${timestamp}\",\"policy_id\":\"policy-plas-burn-in-v1\",\"component\":\"plas_burn_in_gate_suite\",\"event\":\"suite_completed\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  echo "PLAS burn-in gate run manifest: $manifest_path"
+  echo "PLAS burn-in gate events: $events_path"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode

@@ -0,0 +1,184 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_plas_lockstep_${timestamp}}"
+artifact_root="${PLAS_LOCKSTEP_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/plas_lockstep}"
+run_dir="$artifact_root/$timestamp"
+manifest_path="$run_dir/run_manifest.json"
+events_path="$run_dir/plas_lockstep_events.jsonl"
+logs_dir="$run_dir/logs"
+rch_timeout_seconds="${RCH_EXEC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-900}"
+bead_id="${PLAS_LOCKSTEP_BEAD_ID:-bd-32d3}"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir" "$logs_dir"
+
+run_rch() {
+  timeout "${rch_timeout_seconds}" rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=$toolchain" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$target_dir" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+declare -a command_logs=()
+failed_command=""
+failed_log_path=""
+manifest_written=false
+mode_completed=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  local step_index="${#commands_run[@]}"
+  local log_path="${logs_dir}/step_$(printf '%02d' "$step_index").log"
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  command_logs+=("$log_path")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if run_rch "$@" > >(tee "$log_path") 2>&1; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  if rg -q "Remote command finished: exit=0" "$log_path"; then
+    echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out or stalled" \
+      | tee -a "$log_path"
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  failed_command="$command_text"
+  failed_log_path="$log_path"
+  return 1
+}
+
+json_or_null() {
+  local value="$1"
+  if [[ -n "$value" ]]; then
+    printf '"%s"' "$value"
+  else
+    printf 'null'
+  fi
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test plas_lockstep_integration -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+  mode_completed=true
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local git_commit dirty_worktree outcome idx comma error_code_json failed_log_json
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 && "$mode_completed" == true ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+    error_code_json='null'
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-PLAS-LOCKSTEP-0010"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"$run_dir/commands.txt"
+  failed_log_json="$(json_or_null "$failed_log_path")"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.plas-lockstep-suite.run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "component": "plas_lockstep_suite",'
+    echo "  \"bead_id\": \"${bead_id}\","
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${timestamp}\","
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\","
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\","
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\","
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\","
+    echo "  \"mode_completed\": ${mode_completed},"
+    echo "  \"commands_executed\": ${#commands_run[@]},"
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\","
+    fi
+    echo "  \"failed_log\": ${failed_log_json},"
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "command_logs": ['
+    for idx in "${!command_logs[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#command_logs[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${command_logs[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${run_dir}/commands.txt\","
+    echo "    \"logs_dir\": \"${logs_dir}\","
+    echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\","
+    echo '    "source_module": "crates/franken-engine/src/plas_lockstep.rs",'
+    echo '    "integration_test": "crates/franken-engine/tests/plas_lockstep_integration.rs"'
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/commands.txt\","
+    echo "    \"find ${logs_dir} -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort\","
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"$manifest_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"trace_id\":\"trace-plas-lockstep-${timestamp}\",\"decision_id\":\"decision-plas-lockstep-${timestamp}\",\"policy_id\":\"policy-plas-lockstep-v1\",\"component\":\"plas_lockstep_suite\",\"event\":\"suite_completed\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  echo "PLAS lockstep run manifest: $manifest_path"
+  echo "PLAS lockstep events: $events_path"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode
